title: How a man of God keeps going when nothing is working
caption:
Most men quit the season God is using.

The job isn't moving. The prayer feels unanswered. The routine is there but the feeling is gone. And the temptation — every time — is to interpret quiet as empty.

It's not.

Roots grow underground, in the dark, with no audience. Character builds the same way. The season where nothing seems to be happening is often where everything is happening.

So: wake up. Open the Word. Do the work. Not because you feel it — because you said you would. Bring the honest prayer ("I don't understand what You're doing") instead of the polished one. And remember who gets built in the desert.

Jesus spent forty days in the wilderness before His ministry began. Joseph spent years in a pit before a palace. The desert doesn't mean you're done. It might mean you're being prepared.

Save this for the season it's for.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #perseverance #discipline #christianity #scripture
theme: He works — even when it costs him something.
